params.name: Aga Khan Award
params.description:
On Oct 19, 2019 AD, the 14th Aga Khan Award for Architecture was grandly announced in Russia.
The Aga Khan Award for Architecture is a globally renowned accolade established by Aga Khan IV. The award recognizes projects that have made outstanding contributions in the fields of architecture, urban planning, and historic preservation within the Arab world. Emphasizing architecture's role in improving the quality of life and the environment, the Aga Khan Award for Architecture is presented every …
